prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as the Environment Agency is an executive agency of the UK government responsible for environmental protection and regulation in England. The mentioned activities such as waste operations, water discharge, and groundwater activities are regulated under English legislation.
